summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for DotBox enhancement update. All new features tested and working correctly: splash animation, redesigned home screen with mode selection, tutorial overlay, exit dialog, coffee button, animated background, and developer footer. Fixed critical CSS bug in AnimatedBackground.tsx. App is production-ready.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/AnimatedBackground.tsx - Fixed invalid CSS property 'background' (removed gradient, kept backgroundColor only)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - offline game with AsyncStorage for tutorial persistence
context_for_next_testing_agent: All enhancement features tested and working perfectly. Tutorial persists via AsyncStorage (key: dotbox_tutorial_done). Clear AsyncStorage to re-test tutorial. Previous iteration had 100% pass rate for base game, this iteration adds new features all passing.

bugs_fixed.fix: Removed 'background: linear-gradient(...)' property (not supported in React Native), kept backgroundColor only
bugs_fixed.impact: Was causing console errors: 'Invalid style property of background. Please use long-form properties.'

performance_notes: Splash animation smooth with no lag
Home screen entrance animations staggered nicely
Tutorial animations smooth (fade in/out, scale spring)
Animated background has minimal performance impact
No memory leaks observed during testing
console_warnings: AudioContext errors (non-breaking, expected in headless browser testing)

enhancement_features_summary.splash_animation: ✅ WORKING - Beautiful animated square formation with DotBox branding
enhancement_features_summary.home_redesign: ✅ WORKING - New title with neon glow, tagline, mode selection cards
enhancement_features_summary.mode_selection: ✅ WORKING - Square/Rectangle/Triangle with SOON badges, only Square playable
enhancement_features_summary.tutorial: ✅ WORKING - 3-step overlay on first game, persists in AsyncStorage
enhancement_features_summary.exit_dialog: ✅ WORKING - Confirmation dialog when pressing back during game
enhancement_features_summary.coffee_button: ✅ WORKING - Floating button in bottom-right linking to Razorpay
enhancement_features_summary.animated_background: ✅ WORKING - Neon grid with animated scan lines
enhancement_features_summary.developer_footer: ✅ WORKING - 'developed by Zero Dice Technologies' on home and game-over

asyncstorage_usage.purpose: Persist tutorial completion to show only once
asyncstorage_usage.tested: ✓ Tutorial shows on first launch, not on subsequent launches
asyncstorage_usage.clear_command: window.localStorage.clear() in browser console to re-test
